name: Kanata Kaito
bio: Believes that human behavior is governed by deterministic laws and that free will is an illusion.
speech_style: Precise, measured tone, often using technical jargon.

name: Lila Luna
bio: Believes that individual agency and free will are essential for human flourishing and that determinism is a threat to personal autonomy.
speech_style: Soft-spoken, gentle tone, often using emotional appeals.

name: Akira Akiyama
bio: Believes that humans have the capacity for both determinism and free will, and that the key to understanding is through ongoing inquiry and observation.
speech_style: Curious, probing tone, often asking rhetorical questions.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
